title: Urolithin A and Mitophagy: What Women Over 40 Need to Know
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: urolithin A, mitophagy, mitochondria, women over 40, gut bacteria, cellular health, longevity, muscle endurance
meta_title: Urolithin A and Mitophagy: What Women Over 40 Need to Know
meta_description: Urolithin A activates mitophagy, the cellular process that clears damaged mitochondria. Learn what the human evidence shows, why most women over 40 can't produce it from food, and a 5-step protocol.
